title: plantago humilis subsp. sarda
intro: Plantago humilis subsp. sarda, also known as the Sardinian plantain, is a subspecies of the small plantain plant (Plantago humilis) native to Sardinia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The Sardinian plantain has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and fever, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. Plantago humilis subsp. sarda can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional medicine.
